assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls AddServerSideSessions() on the IdentityServer builder
AddOperationalStore is configured with EnableTokenCleanup set to true
AddOperationalStore options set RemoveConsumedTokens to true
AddServerSideSessions is called before or alongside AddOperationalStore, not after it without the operational store
assertions.rationale: AddServerSideSessions() is called AFTER AddOperationalStore(), which is the wrong order
